dialogos.texto_en: We're going on our graduation trip\nright after our graduation ceremony.\nHave you finished preparing, Itsuki?
I'll take a little longer.\nI still have some things I can't decide\nwhether to bring or not.
If you have too much luggage,\nwhy not send it ahead?\nIt'll be tough to move around with it being heavy.
I wonder if Futaro is ready.
Everyone, listen up.
Nino?
There's something I want to clarify once more\nbefore we go on the trip.
...What is it?
This graduation trip is a stage\nfor Fu-kun to give us an answer.
We are all thinking this way, aren't we?
...Yes.
Futaro was probably thinking the same thing.\nHe seemed very agitated when Itsuki asked him about it.
Well, I at least hope so.
He said that he'd choose no one at the school festival,\nbut he might have felt irresponsible for saying that\nin the past six months.
So, Uesugi-san might've changed his mind?
It doesn't really look like he has,\nbut it does look like he's pondering something.
After the school festival,\nthings got busy with the exams intensifying.
Yet we managed to get through the exams somehow!\nI'm sure Uesugi-san also had some time to think.
Even so, we have hardly any time left.
Once the trip is over, Futaro will go to Tokyo.
That's right.\nAnd yet%p-2;――
I absolutely hate being in this lukewarm relationship.
Since the night of the festival,\nmy feelings haven't changed even once.
I feel the same.\nI want Futaro to give us an answer.
Even if it's not the result I want,\nI'm ready to accept it.
This graduation trip is our last chance.
Miku and I have already made up our minds.
So, let me ask again.\nWhat about you guys?
Yotsuba?
I hope that the time will come when \neveryone's feelings will be fulfilled.
Everyone's, huh?
Yeah.\nIt's not just about who Uesugi-san chooses.
We want him to accept everyone's feelings,\nand then give us an answer.
I think that's the best thing for Uesugi-san, as well.
I, too, agree with getting an answer from Uesugi-kun.
Despite this obviously tanglesome plan,\nI thought you would be the first to oppose it.
Whatever our thoughts or feelings,\nwe are all waiting for him to give an answer.
Ever since that night...\nwe've been at a standstill.
Besides, this could be a good opportunity...
What is?
Huh?
You said this could be a good opportunity, didn't you?
Ah...
Ahh, um, you know!\nA good opportunity for Uesugi-kun\nto reflect on his indecisiveness.
Itsuki, you're so harsh.\nOur Uesugi-san is definitely reflecting on it.
I don't know if he IS reflecting.
Ichika.\nYou like him too, don't you?
Whoa, that came out of nowhere.
What do you want to do, Ichika?
Hmm, I didn't think Futaro-kun\nwould be so indecisive up to this point.\nIt's really quite troubling.
Even if you try to deceive us, it's useless.\nYou haven't given up yet.
I know that much.
...This really is so troublesome.
But, you don't have to give up?
Miku...
And, you don't need to hold back.
Huh...?
When Futaro decided that he wouldn't choose anyone\nat that time, it was his own decision.
The fact is that he is trying again to give us an answer\nbut that's his own decision.
We're all rivals,\nand it's Futaro who will choose.
Ichika, we won't blame you if you want him to choose you.
What you want to do, is up to you.
Ichika...
